glosses.ja: 連絡する; 連絡を取る

sentences.target: Je contacte le service client maintenant.

translations.fr: Je contacte le service client maintenant.
translations.es: Estoy contactando al servicio de atención al cliente ahora.
translations.it: Sto contattando il servizio clienti adesso.
translations.ru: Я сейчас связываюсь со службой поддержки.
translations.pt: Estou entrando em contato com o atendimento ao cliente agora.
translations.tr: Şu anda müşteri hizmetleriyle iletişime geçiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang liên hệ với dịch vụ khách hàng ngay bây giờ.
translations.ar: أنا أتواصل مع خدمة العملاء الآن.
translations.nl: Ik neem nu contact op met de klantenservice.
translations.uk: Я зараз зв’язуюся зі службою підтримки.
translations.hu: Most felveszem a kapcsolatot az ügyfélszolgálattal.
translations.hi: मैं अभी ग्राहक सेवा से संपर्क कर रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Kontaktuję się teraz z obsługą klienta.
translations.el: Επικοινωνώ τώρα με την εξυπηρέτηση πελατών.
translations.id: Saya sedang menghubungi layanan pelanggan sekarang.
translations.ja: 今、カスタマーサービスに連絡しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun; 1st person singular; functions as the subject of the finite verb 'contacte'.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting the direct object NP 'le service client'.
Definite article; masculine singular; introduces the noun 'service' and marks definiteness.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the NP; modified by the following noun 'client' to form the compound 'service client'.
Common noun; masculine singular; post-nominal noun used as a compound modifier specifying the type of service ('service client').
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase; indicates the action takes place at the present time.

translations.en: You are contacting the owner today.
translations.pt: Hoje você entra em contato com o proprietário.
translations.he: אתם יוצרים קשר עם הבעלים היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bạn liên hệ với chủ nhà.
translations.nl: Je neemt vandaag contact op met de eigenaar.
translations.hu: Ma felveszed a kapcsolatot a tulajdonossal.
translations.hi: आज आप मालिक से संपर्क कर रहे हैं।
translations.ja: あなたは今日、オーナーに連絡します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person; plural or formal singular; subject of 'contactez'.
Main verb; present indicative, 2nd person plural; transitive; takes the direct object 'le propriétaire'.
Definite article; masculine singular; introduces 'propriétaire' and marks definiteness.
Common noun; gender-invariant (masculine/feminine); functions as the direct object of 'contactez'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause; indicates the action occurs today.

sentences.target: On préfère contacter un plombier demain.

translations.fr: On préfère contacter un plombier demain.
translations.en: We prefer to contact a plumber tomorrow.
translations.es: Preferimos contactar a un fontanero mañana.
translations.de: Wir kontaktieren lieber morgen einen Klempner.
translations.ko: 우리는 내일 배관공에게 연락하는 것을 선호해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们倾向于明天联系水管工。
translations.yue: 我哋寧願聽日聯絡水喉師傅。
translations.ru: Мы предпочитаем связаться с сантехником завтра.
translations.pt: Preferimos entrar em contato com um encanador amanhã.
translations.he: אנחנו מעדיפים ליצור קשר עם אינסטלטור מחר.
translations.tr: Yarın bir tesisatçıyla iletişime geçmeyi tercih ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thích liên hệ với thợ sửa ống nước vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: نحن نفضل التواصل مع سباك غدًا.
translations.nl: We nemen liever morgen contact op met een loodgieter.
translations.uk: Ми воліємо зв’язатися із сантехніком завтра.
translations.hu: Holnap inkább felvesszük a kapcsolatot egy vízvezeték-szerelővel.
translations.hi: हम कल एक प्लंबर से संपर्क करना पसंद करते हैं।
translations.pl: Wolimy jutro skontaktować się z hydraulikiem.
translations.el: Προτιμάμε να επικοινωνήσουμε με έναν υδραυλικό αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi foretrekker å kontakte en rørlegger i morgen.
translations.id: Kami lebih suka menghubungi tukang ledeng besok.
translations.sv: Vi föredrar att kontakta en rörmokare i morgon.
translations.ro: Preferăm să contactăm un instalator mâine.
translations.da: Vi foretrækker at kontakte en VVS-mand i morgen.
translations.ja: 私たちは明日、配管工に連絡するのを好みます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal pronoun used colloquially for 'we'; grammatically 3rd person singular; subject of 'préfère'.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects the infinitival complement 'contacter'.
Verb in the infinitive; complement of 'préfère'; heads its own VP and takes the direct object 'un plombier'.
Indefinite article; masculine singular; introduces 'plombier'; marks non-specific reference.
Common noun; masculine; direct object of the infinitive 'contacter'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause; indicates the action is scheduled for the following day.

sentences.target: Ils contactent leurs voisins pour l'anniversaire.

translations.fr: Ils contactent leurs voisins pour l'anniversaire.
translations.en: They are contacting their neighbors for the birthday.
translations.es: Están contactando a sus vecinos para el cumpleaños.
translations.de: Sie kontaktieren ihre Nachbarn wegen des Geburtstags.
translations.it: Stanno contattando i loro vicini per il compleanno.
translations.ko: 그들은 생일을 위해 이웃들에게 연락하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在为生日联系邻居。
translations.yue: 佢哋為咗生日聯絡鄰居。
translations.ru: Они связываются со своими соседями по поводу дня рождения.
translations.pt: Eles estão entrando em contato com os vizinhos por causa do aniversário.
translations.he: הם יוצרים קשר עם השכנים לכבוד יום ההולדת.
translations.tr: Doğum günü için komşularıyla iletişime geçiyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ đang liên hệ với hàng xóm vì sinh nhật.
translations.ar: هم يتواصلون مع جيرانهم من أجل عيد الميلاد.
translations.nl: Ze nemen contact op met hun buren voor de verjaardag.
translations.uk: Вони зв’язуються зі своїми сусідами щодо дня народження.
translations.hu: A születésnap miatt felveszik a kapcsolatot a szomszédaikkal.
translations.hi: वे जन्मदिन के लिए अपने पड़ोसियों से संपर्क कर रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Kontaktują się ze swoimi sąsiadami z okazji urodzin.
translations.el: Επικοινωνούν με τους γείτονές τους για τα γενέθλια.
translations.nb: De kontakter naboene sine for bursdagen.
translations.id: Mereka menghubungi tetangga mereka untuk ulang tahun.
translations.sv: De kontaktar sina grannar inför födelsedagen.
translations.ro: Ei își contactează vecinii pentru ziua de naștere.
translations.da: De kontakter deres naboer i anledning af fødselsdagen.
translations.fi: He ottavat yhteyttä naapureihinsa syntymäpäivää varten.
translations.ja: 彼らは誕生日のために近所の人たちに連絡しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person plural; subject of 'contactent'; generic/mixed masculine.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive; takes 'leurs voisins' as direct object and a purpose PP 'pour l'anniversaire'.
Possessive determiner; 3rd person plural possessor; plural form agreeing with plural head noun 'voisins'.
Common noun; masculine plural; direct object of 'contactent'.
Preposition; introduces a prepositional phrase expressing purpose/occasion.
Definite article elided before a vowel; masculine singular; clitic determiner attached to the following noun.
Common noun; masculine; object of the preposition 'pour'.

あなたは今日、オーナーに連絡します。
